shareSubtitle: Send this post to a conversation
noConversationsDescription: Start a conversation first, then share posts here.
shareError: Could not send the post. Please try again.
searchFriendsToAdd: Search for friends you want to add to the group.
groupPhotoLater: You can add a group photo later
createGroupError: Could not create the group. Please try again.
suggestedFriendsHint: Friends you message most appear first.
noSuggestedFriends: Your friends will appear here. You can also search by name.
messageEditFailed: Could not edit the message. It may be older than two hours.
messageDeleteFailed: Could not delete the message. Please try again.
unpublishCommentDescription: This comment and its replies will be removed from the post.
removeHatefulCommentDescription: As the post author, you can remove hateful or abusive comments from this conversation.
blockAndReportPrompt: Would you also like to block and report @{{username}}?
commentActionError: Could not update this comment. Please try again.
commentPinUnknownError: The server did not provide a reason. Make sure the latest backend and database migrations are deployed.
removeAuthorNoteHint: Remove this note from the comments section.
removeAuthorNoteDescription: The note will be permanently removed from this post.
authorNoteHint: Continue your caption at the top of the comments.
authorNotePlaceholder: Add context, details, or the rest of your story…
authorNoteError: Could not save your author note. Please try again.
authorToolsHint: Add something extra to the conversation.
pollHint: Ask readers a question and see their votes.
pollCreateError: Could not create this poll. Please try again.
pollVoteError: Could not record your vote. Please try again.
commentPinLimitDescription: You can pin up to 3 comments. Unpin one before pinning another.
pinChatHint: Keep this conversation at the top
pinLimitDescription: You can pin up to 3 chats. Unpin one before pinning another.
pinChatError: Could not update this pinned chat. Please try again.
messageStarError: Could not update this starred message. Please try again.
starredMessagesPrivate: Only you can see which messages you starred.
noStarredMessagesDescription: Long-press an important message and choose Star message to keep it here.
archiveChatHint: Hide this conversation from your main chat list
unarchiveChatHint: Return this conversation to your main chat list
archiveChatError: Could not update this archived chat. Please try again.
noArchivedChatsDescription: Chats you archive will be kept here until you restore them.
searchMessagesHint: Find something said in this conversation
messageSearchMinimum: Enter at least 2 characters to search through your messages.
